# EditLingo Solutions

> Intellectual depth. Exceptional craft. Multi-agent experiences that make ideas memorable.

EditLingo Solutions is a software company that builds AI-powered multi-agent products. We transform complex ideas into polished, intelligent software experiences.

## Products

- HistOracle: An AI-powered historical exploration platform that brings history to life through multi-agent conversations. Users can interact with historically accurate AI personas, explore events, and gain deep insights into the past.
